title: DevOps
description: Automate, deploy, and scale with confidence

items.label: Dockerfile
items.code:
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --only=production
COPY . .
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

items.label: Docker Commands
items.code:
docker build -t myapp .
docker run -d -p 3000:3000 --name myapp myapp
docker logs -f myapp
docker exec -it myapp sh

items.label: docker-compose.yml
items.code:
version: '3.8'
services:
  web:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    depends_on:
      - db
  db:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: secret
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  pgdata:

items.label: GitHub Actions
items.code:
name: CI/CD
on: [push]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 20 }
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npm test
  deploy:
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo "Deploying..."
